text: pool.ts: pool-on 원격 exec에 setsid+timeout+cleanup trap 배선 — ssh 세션 드롭 시 원격 커맨드 트리 자동 수거(고아 fork storm 근절 · convergence pool-ts-1)

commons.md headroom = 104B (9896/10000). 32-rule adversarial audit (57 agents) verdict: rules are NOT bloated — 12 of 13 proposed compressions were refuted as lossy, 0 drift confirmed. Only loss-free lever left is a governance-scope decision (owner): move the 2 repo-specific rules (pi5-akida-anima 225B + hexa-lang-model 422B) from the always-on cross-project config/commons.md to .harness/commons.md overrides in the repos that own them = -647B -> 1031B headroom, zero normative loss (line 3 declares the file project-agnostic; these name one physical device + one language ecosystem, injected into every void/merchant/dancinlab turn as pure context-rot). Second open decision: 19 repos still carry the fossil scratchDir=scripts/scratch (#52 unified to state/) — the self-contradicting inject is fixed (#421) but their outputs sit outside the state/ convention; migrating moves real files across 19 repos. Audit artifacts: workflow wf_de90201f-563.
